description_long: This is a round, yeast-raised donut with a golden-brown exterior and a thick layer of glossy chocolate icing covering the top. The chocolate icing is decorated with a white zigzag drizzle, adding a visually appealing contrast. The donut's sides show a slight gradient from golden brown to a lighter, fluffy interior, suggesting a soft and airy texture. The icing appears smooth and slightly reflective, while the donut itself has a matte, bread-like finish. There are no visible toppings other than the icing drizzle, and the donut is unwrapped and not placed in any packaging. The object is presented on a plain, neutral background, emphasizing its form and decoration.
description: A round, golden-brown donut topped with glossy chocolate icing and a white zigzag drizzle, unwrapped and visually appealing.
description_view_0: Front view shows the donut's chocolate icing with a prominent white zigzag drizzle and a slightly uneven, puffy edge.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thick chocolate icing and the vertical white drizzle lines, with the donut's golden-brown side visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the chocolate icing with a less pronounced white drizzle and a visible seam along the top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the chocolate icing and white drizzle, with the donut's rounded, slightly compressed shape.
attribute_icing_type: Chocolate glaze with a white sugar icing drizzle, smooth and glossy in appearance.
